title: Glah Ubooki's Strange & Wondrous Imports (article)

"'''Glah Ubooki's Strange & Wondrous Imports'''" is an article written by [[Shane Hensley]] with illustrations by [[Tim Eldred]]. It was published in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 1|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' ''1'']] in [[February]] [[1994]] by [[West End Games]].

==Contents==
This article serves as a supplementary piece for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'', introducing [[Glah Ubooki]], a [[Bimm/Legends|Bimm]] who, a decade before, stumbled upon an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Unidentified Imperial R&D vessel|R&D ship]] that been had wrecked on [[Bimmisaari/Legends|Bimmisaari]]. He managed to sell the prototype weapons and equipment to [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] agents. When the money from that sale started to run low, he and his brothers decided to buy a ship and explore [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] to find other wonders and treasure which they now sell at various stores.
